free_text: Low energy octupole resonance in 46Ti studied by
inelastic proton scattering at 65 MeV
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Department of Physics
Laboratory of Nuclear Studies, Faculty of
Science
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
M.Fujiwara, Numerical data
Beam intensity is less than 30 nA.
POL-BM: Monitored by 12C(p,p0) at 47.5
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.275 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
AVF cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
Solid angle of detector is 3.2 msr.
RAIDEN to analyze momentum of reaction
products
Used as Delta E detector
Used as E detector
Energy weighted sum rule
See NRDF D1131 DATA,152 for detail.
DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation) (Code
ECIS)
On. Converted from NRDF D1131
Nf. MONITOR added
ANG-CM is polar angle between beam and proton in
center of mass system
No information on source of uncertainties
Data (not shown in reference) received from
M.Fujiwara (1988)
